/usr/bin/clang  -fsanitize=address CMakeFiles/blockchain.dir/src/blockchain.c.o CMakeFiles/blockchain.dir/src/main.c.o -o blockchain  -Wl,-rpath,/home/cmpt201/units/04-long-assignments/a12-MarikaScrepnek/lib /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /home/cmpt201/units/04-long-assignments/a12-MarikaScrepnek/lib/libcheck-x86_64.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so
